c74object.name: discordvoice~
c74object.digest: Stream audio to Discord voice channels
c74object.description: The discordvoice~ object enables real-time audio streaming from Max directly to a Discord voice channel. It handles the Discord Gateway signaling, Voice Gateway handshake (including DAVE/E2EE protocol negotiation), and audio encoding necessary for integration with the Discord API.

inlet.description: Audio signal for the left channel. Also accepts control messages like 'connect'.
Audio signal for the right channel.

outlet.description: Outputs an integer indicating the current connection state (0: Disconnected, 1: Connecting, 2: Connected, 3: Identified, 4: Ready, 5: Voice Ready).
Detailed status and error messages from the internal networking thread.

method.name: connect
method.digest: Connect to Discord and join a voice channel
method.description:
Starts the connection process. The message should be the word connect followed by three symbols as a list.
Format: connect [token] [guild_id] [channel_id]
Example: connect MTAyND... 123456789012345678 987654321098765432
token: Your Discord Bot Token (as a single symbol).
guild_id: The 18-digit Snowflake ID of the Discord server.
channel_id: The 18-digit Snowflake ID of the target voice channel.

method.name: bang
method.description: Triggers an immediate output of the connection status integer from the first outlet.

attr.name: log
attr.description: When enabled (1), the object will post detailed connection progress and protocol messages to the second outlet. This is useful for debugging connection issues and monitoring the Discord Gateway/Voice Gateway handshake process.
